comment.body:
one of my boxing coach told me (when he saw that I'm afraid to being hit) that lets accept the fact that you will be hit. and move on.

very important.
Muhammad Ali was hit. Mike Tyson was hit. Rocky Marciano was hit.
Natalia Osipova also made mistakes on the stage...
Jim Simons, Warren Buffet... they all lost money time to time...

accept it that this is a part of the game, and move on.

comment.body:
Hello Alma.

One thing that I have been thinking about from your posts on X and also messages here and in the substack posts. It is regarding when you refer to the Balkan region as being the most dangerous for a war.

Do you really refer to Kosovo to be a point of conflict? That would happen  only if NATO leaves or if a weakened one is there because the US left. This probably would happen only if EU goes with China and does not negotiate with US. And that probably could escalate really quickly into a global war, involving Russia and EU. Just wanted to share the movie I have in my head 😅

Thank you very much for all you do, your substack posts and for forcing us to think.
comment.raw_body:
Hello Alma.

One thing that I have been thinking about from your posts on X and also messages here and in the substack posts. It is regarding when you refer to the Balkan region as being the most dangerous for a war.

Do you really refer to Kosovo to be a point of conflict? That would happen  only if NATO leaves or if a weakened one is there because the US left. This probably would happen only if EU goes with China and does not negotiate with US. And that probably could escalate really quickly into a global war, involving Russia and EU. Just wanted to share the movie I have in my head 😅

Thank you very much for all you do, your substack posts and for forcing us to think.
